title: Code Review
prompt: Review this code for bugs, performance issues, and best practices. Suggest specific improvements with code examples.

title: Debug Error
prompt: I am getting this error: [paste error]. Here is my code: [paste code]. Explain what is causing the error and provide a fix.

title: Blog Post
prompt: Write a 1500-word blog post about [topic]. Include engaging introduction, 5-7 main points, actionable takeaways, and SEO-friendly structure.

title: Email Template
prompt: Write a professional email for [purpose]. Include clear subject line, concise opening, main message, and call to action.

title: SWOT Analysis
prompt: Conduct a SWOT analysis for [company/product]. Provide 5 strengths, 5 weaknesses, 5 opportunities, 5 threats, and strategic recommendations.
